title: Resistance Training Complements Anti-TNF Therapy in DSS-Induced Colitis by Improving Skeletal Muscle Inflammatory and Mitochondrial Gene Signatures.
snippet: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is associated with skeletal muscle loss and mitochondrial dysfunction, which may compromise therapeutic responsiveness. We investigated whether progressive resistance training could improve muscle oxidative phosphorylation gene expression and enhance the efficacy of anti-TNF-α therapy (infliximab) in a dextran sulfate....
